zh-CN.name: 马蹄莲
zh-CN.intro: 马蹄莲的花朵像一个小小的马蹄，洁白的花瓣轻轻包住花蕊，像春天里的小喇叭，优雅又可爱。

story.title: 🌸小马蹄莲的梦想
story.body: 窗台上有一盆小小的马蹄莲，它每天看着窗外的世界。春天来了，小马蹄莲慢慢长高，一片白色的花瓣舒展开来，像一个精致的杯子。小蝴蝶飞过来，问：“你叫什么名字呀？”小马蹄莲害羞地说：“我叫马蹄莲，因为我长得像小马的马蹄。”小蝴蝶扇扇翅膀，说：“你真漂亮！”小马蹄莲开心极了，它想：我要努力喝水，开更多的花，让房间变得像花园一样美丽。阳光暖暖地照着，小马蹄莲轻轻摇动，好像在跳舞。

knowledge.title: 为什么叫马蹄莲？
knowledge.body: 马蹄莲的花苞形状很像马的蹄子，所以有了这个好听的名字。它的花其实不是那片白色的花瓣，而是中间黄色的小棒，叫做肉穗花序。

en.name: Calla Lily
en.intro: The calla lily is a graceful flower with a white petal that wraps around a yellow center. It looks like a tiny trumpet or a horse's hoof.

story.title: 🌸The Little Calla Lily's Dream
story.body: On the windowsill sat a little calla lily. Every day, it looked out at the world. When spring came, the calla lily grew taller, and its white petal unfurled like a delicate cup. A small butterfly flew over and asked, "What is your name?" The calla lily shyly said, "I am a calla lily, because I look like a little horse's hoof." The butterfly fluttered its wings and said, "You are so pretty!" The calla lily was overjoyed. It thought, I will drink lots of water and bloom more flowers, making the room as beautiful as a garden. The warm sun shone down, and the calla lily swayed gently, as if dancing.

knowledge.title: Why is it called a Calla Lily?
knowledge.body: The flower's shape looks like a horse's hoof, which gave it the name 'calla lily.' The white part is actually a leaf called a spathe, and the yellow spike inside is the true flower.
